data.content:
# Handoff — Implementation → Implementation Review

## Artifact
- **Branch:** `foolery-3200-hermetic-tests`
- **Commit on origin/main:** `8e930697` (`50305cf4..8e930697`, fast-forward)
- **PR:** none (per project policy: direct push to main)

## What changed
- Moved 8 non-hermetic test files into `src/**/__manual_tests__/` (5 prior + 3 new).
- Refactored 3 test files to replace direct `process.env` mutation with `vi.stubEnv` + `vi.unstubAllEnvs`.
- Fixed pre-existing duplicated docstring blocks in 4 manual-test files.

## How to verify
```sh
git fetch origin && git checkout 8e930697  # or origin/main
bun install --frozen-lockfile
bun run lint
bunx tsc --noEmit
bun run test            # default suite, hermetic
bun run test:manual     # opt-in, exercises real env (host preconditions in each file's docstring)
bun run test:storybook
bun run build
```

Hostile-mode matrix (commands captured in the audit note) all yield identical pass counts.

## Acceptance check
- [x] `src/**/__tests__/` hermetic per docs/DEVELOPING.md (no env vars, no real fs, no spawn, no network, no host binaries)
- [x] Non-hermetic tests moved to `src/**/__manual_tests__/` (or refactored where stubEnv suffices)
- [x] `bun run test` passes deterministically regardless of host state (verified via 3-scenario hostile-mode matrix)

## Notes for reviewer
- The 3 `vi.stubEnv` refactors retain identical test semantics (assertions on `env.BD_NO_DB === undefined` and friends still pass; `vi.stubEnv(name, undefined)` deletes the var, distinct from setting `""`).
- The `app-update.test.ts` move (vs. plan's preferred refactor with `vi.mock("node:fs/promises")`) is documented in the audit note.
